ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 替换（删除旧的，发布新的）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to send Publish requests. Leave as https://yeet.md unless you self-host.
ast.target: 发送发布请求的目标地址。除非您自行托管，否则请保留为 https://yeet.md。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a warning before each publish. Recommended on so you get a reminder that the content becomes public.
ast.target: 在每次发布前显示警告。建议开启，以便您收到内容将变为公开的提醒。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically copy the snapshot URL to clipboard once a publish succeeds.
ast.target: 发布成功后自动将快照 URL 复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the snapshot URL in your default browser once a publish succeeds.
ast.target: 发布成功后在默认浏览器中打开快照 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notice with the snapshot URL after a successful publish.
ast.target: 发布成功后显示包含快照 URL 的通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated property names to remove from the copy sent to yeet.md. Keys starting with an underscore are always stripped. Your note is not modified.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的属性名称，这些属性将从发送到 yeet.md 的副本中移除。以下划线开头的键始终会被剥离。您的笔记不会被修改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Warning: API base URL is not HTTPS. Delete tokens will travel unencrypted.
ast.target: 警告：API 基础 URL 不是 HTTPS。删除令牌将以未加密方式传输。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Can't delete the old snapshot: its token isn't on this device. Publishing a new one alongside.
ast.target: 无法删除旧快照：其令牌不在此设备上。将发布一个新的快照。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This snapshot can only be deleted from the device that published it. Its token is stored in that device's secret storage.
ast.target: 此快照只能从发布它的设备上删除。其令牌存储在该设备的密钥存储中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Where to send Publish requests. Leave as https://yeet.md unless you self-host.
ast.target: 发送发布请求的目标地址。除非您自行托管，否则请保留为 https://yeet.md。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show a warning before each publish. Recommended on so you get a reminder that the content becomes public.
ast.target: 在每次发布前显示警告。建议开启，以便您收到内容将变为公开的提醒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically copy the snapshot URL to clipboard once a publish succeeds.
ast.target: 发布成功后自动将快照 URL 复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open the snapshot URL in your default browser once a publish succeeds.
ast.target: 发布成功后在默认浏览器中打开快照 URL。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display a notice with the snapshot URL after a successful publish.
ast.target: 发布成功后显示包含快照 URL 的通知。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Comma-separated property names to remove from the copy sent to yeet.md. Keys starting with an underscore are always stripped. Your note is not modified.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的属性名称，这些属性将从发送到 yeet.md 的副本中移除。以下划线开头的键始终会被剥离。您的笔记不会被修改。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Copy published link for current note
ast.target: 复制当前笔记的已发布链接

ast.name: name
ast.source: Unpublish latest snapshot of current note
ast.target: 取消发布当前笔记的最新快照

ast.name: name
ast.source: Show all published snapshots from this vault
ast.target: 显示此保险库中所有已发布的快照

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can delete the snapshot from this device later.
ast.target: 您稍后可以从此设备删除该快照。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Heads up: the delete token is stored in this device's secret storage. If you uninstall the plugin or lose your keychain, the snapshot can only be removed by reporting it to the site operator.
ast.target: 请注意：删除令牌存储在此设备的密钥存储中。如果您卸载插件或丢失密钥链，该快照只能通过向站点运营商报告来移除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This note was previously published but its content has changed since. What would you like to do?
ast.target: 此笔记之前已发布，但其内容自那时起已更改。您想怎么做？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Nothing published from this vault yet. Every publish creates a new immutable snapshot; prior ones stay live at their own links until you delete them.
ast.target: 此保险库中尚未发布任何内容。每次发布都会创建一个新的不可变快照；之前的快照将保留在各自的链接上，直到您删除它们。
